item.title: New York City Retirement Systems 2023 Shareowner Initiatives
item.description:
No. 23-60230 In the United States Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit
NATIONAL CENTER FOR PUBLIC POLICY RESEARCH ; NATHANIEL FISCHER ; PHILLIP ARONOFF , Petitioners, v. SECURITIES AND EXCHANGE COMMISSION , Respondent.
Petition for Review from an Order of the Securities and Exchange Commission
MOTION FOR LEAVE TO INTERVENE BY THE NATIONAL ASSOCIATION OF MANUFACTURERS
Steven P. Lehotsky Adam Steene LEHOTSKY KELLER COHN LLP 200 Massachusetts Avenue, NW Suite 700…

item.title: Annual Summary Contracts Report for the City of New York
item.description:
CITY RECORD ONLINE (CROL) USER MANUAL
Agencies SHOULD NOT submit notices for publication through this site. To request access to submit Non-Procurement Notices contact the City Record Office at CROLUpdates@dcas.nyc.gov To request access to submit Procurement Notices contact the City Record Office at Cityrecord@dcas.nyc.gov
2 Table of Contents

item.description:
Report to the Mayor and City Council on City Comptroller Audit Operations Fiscal Year 2023 BUREAU OF AUDIT AND INVESTIGATIONS FEBRUARY 2, 2024 1 Centre Street, New York, NY 10007 • (212) 669-3916 • www.comptroller.nyc.gov • @NYCComptroller
Brad Lander Comptroller
Executive Deputy Comptroller for Management and Operations Sandra Abeles Deputy Comptroller for Audit Maura Hayes-Chaffe Assistant Comptroller, Financial Audits and Special Reports Faige Hornung…

item.title: Annual Claims Report
item.description:
Annual Claims Report Fiscal Year 2023 APRIL 2024 1 Centre Street, New York, NY 10007 • (212) 669-3916 • www.comptroller.nyc.gov • @NYCComptroller
THE CITY OF NEW YORK OFFICE OF THE COMPTROLLER BRAD LANDER COMPTROLLER
April 16, 2024
Dear New Yorkers: I am pleased to share the Office of the Comptroller’s Annual Claims Report for Fiscal Year (FY) 2023, covering July 1, 2022 through June 30, 2023. Under the New York City Charter Section 93(i), the Comptroller is…

item.title: Annual Comprehensive Financial Reports (ACFR)
item.description: xiii THE CITY OF NEW YORK OFFICE OF THE COMPTROLLER BRAD LANDER COMPTROLLER October 30, 2025 TO THE PEOPLE OF THE CITY OF NEW YORK It is my privilege to present the City of New York’s Annual Comprehensive Financial Report (ACFR) for Fiscal Year 2025. This year marks the 50th anniversary of the enactment of the Financial Emergency Act (FEA), which established the City’s strong fiscal practices, including the requirement that the ACFR is published each year by the end of October. Despite…
